simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISBTACALLOC_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISBTACALLOC_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description:
No new entries are allocated in BTAC, but existing entries can be
updated.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISBTACREAD_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISBTACREAD_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: BTAC is not used and only static branch prediction can occur.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISCRITAXIRUR_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISCRITAXIRUR_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description:
An AXI read to Strongly-ordered or device memory, or an LDREX to
shared memory, is not put on AXI if there are any outstanding reads
on AXI. Transactions on AXI cannot be interrupted. This bit might
reduce the time that these transactions are in progress and might
improve worst case interrupt latency. Performance is decreased when
this bit is set.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDI_DB_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDI_DB_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Direct branches instruction type cannot be dual-issued in channel 0

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDI_IB_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDI_IB_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description:
Indirect branches, but not loads to PC instruction type cannot be
dual-issued in channel 0

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDI_LPC_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDI_LPC_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Loads to PC instruction type cannot be dual-issued in channel 0

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDI_MAC_MUL_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDI_MAC_MUL_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description:
Integer MAC and MUL instruction type cannot be dual-issued in channel
0

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDI_VFP_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDI_VFP_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: VFP instruction type cannot be dual-issued in channel 0

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISDYNADD_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISDYNADD_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: All ADD and SUB instructions are resolved in EX2.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISFOLD_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISFOLD_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Interruption folding disabled

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISISSCH1_DB_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISISSCH1_DB_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Direct branches instruction type cannot be issued in channel 1

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISISSCH1_IB_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISISSCH1_IB_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description:
Indirect branches, but not loads to PC instruction type cannot be
issued in channel 1

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISISSCH1_LPC_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISISSCH1_LPC_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Loads to PC instruction type cannot be issued in channel 1

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISISSCH1_MAC_MUL_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISISSCH1_MAC_MUL_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Integer MAC and MUL instruction type cannot be issued in channel 1

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISISSCH1_VFP_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISISSCH1_VFP_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: VFP instruction type cannot be issued in channel 1

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISITMATBFLUSH_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISITMATBFLUSH_Field is
  (
   Actlr_Disitmatbflush_Field_Reset,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Actlr_Disitmatbflush_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
ITM and DWT ATB flush disabled. AFVALID is ignored and AFREADY is
held HIGH.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_DISRAMODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_DISRAMODE_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: Dynamic disabled.

simple_types.name: ACTLR_PFEXCODIS_Field
simple_types.code:
type ACTLR_PFEXCODIS_Field is
  (
   Normal,
   Disable)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Normal
enumeration_literals.description: FPU exception outputs are disabled.

simple_types.name: AIRCR_ENDIANNESS_Field
simple_types.code:
type AIRCR_ENDIANNESS_Field is
  (
   Little_Endian,
   Big_Endian)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Little_Endian
enumeration_literals.description: Data is big endian

simple_types.name: AIRCR_PRIGROUP_Field
simple_types.code:
type AIRCR_PRIGROUP_Field is
  (
   Bxxxxxxx_Y,
   Bxxxxxx_YY,
   Bxxxxx_YYY,
   Bxxxx_YYYY,
   Bxxx_YYYYY,
   Bxx_YYYYYY,
   Bx_YYYYYYY,
   B_YYYYYYYY)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: Bxxxxxxx_Y
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7:2], subpriority bits [1:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bxxxxxx_YY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7:3], subpriority bits [2:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bxxxxx_YYY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7:4], subpriority bits [3:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bxxxx_YYYY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7:5], subpriority bits [4:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bxxx_YYYYY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7:6], subpriority bits [5:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bxx_YYYYYY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: [7], subpriority bits [6:0]

enumeration_literals.name: Bx_YYYYYYY
enumeration_literals.description: Group priority bits: None, subpriority bits [7:0]

simple_types.name: AIRCR_VECTKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type AIRCR_VECTKEY_Field is
  (
   Key,
   Key_Read)
  with Size => 16;

enumeration_literals.name: Key
enumeration_literals.description: The read key

simple_types.name: CCR_NONBASETHREADENA_Field
simple_types.code:
type CCR_NONBASETHREADENA_Field is
  (
   No_Active_Exception,
   On_Exc_Return)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: No_Active_Exception
enumeration_literals.description:
Processor can enter Thread mode from any level under the control of
an EXC_RETURN value

simple_types.name: CPUID_Implementer_Field
simple_types.code:
type CPUID_Implementer_Field is
  (
   Arm)
  with Size => 8;

simple_types.name: CPUID_PartNo_Field
simple_types.code:
type CPUID_PartNo_Field is
  (
   Cortex_M7)
  with Size => 12;

simple_types.name: CPUID_Revision_Field
simple_types.code:
type CPUID_Revision_Field is
  (
   P0,
   P1,
   P2)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: P0
enumeration_literals.description: Patch 1

enumeration_literals.name: P1
enumeration_literals.description: Patch 2

simple_types.name: CPUID_Variant_Field
simple_types.code:
type CPUID_Variant_Field is
  (
   R0,
   R1)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: R0
enumeration_literals.description: Revision 1

simple_types.name: ICSR_RETTOBASE_Field
simple_types.code:
type ICSR_RETTOBASE_Field is
  (
   Preempted,
   No_Preempted)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Preempted
enumeration_literals.description:
There are no active exceptions, or the currently-executing exception
is the only active exception.

record_types.name: ACTLR_Register

fields.name: PFEXCODIS
fields.description:
Disables dynamic read allocate mode for Write-Back Write-Allocate
memory regions:

fields.name: DISRAMODE
fields.description: Read-only. Disables ITM and DWT ATB flush:

fields.name: DISITMATBFLUSH
fields.description: Disables the Branch Target Address Cache (BTAC):

fields.name: DISBTACREAD
fields.description: Disables the Branch Target Address Cache allocation:

fields.name: DISDI_LPC
fields.description: Disables integer MAC and MUL dual-issued instructions:

fields.name: DISDI_VFP
fields.description: Disables direct branches instructions in channel 1:

fields.name: DISISSCH1_DB
fields.description: Disables indirect branches instructions in channel 1:

fields.name: DISISSCH1_IB
fields.description: Disables loads to PC instructions in channel 1:

fields.name: DISISSCH1_LPC
fields.description: Disables integer MAC and MUL instructions in channel 1:

fields.name: DISISSCH1_VFP
fields.description: Disables dybnamic allocation of ADD ans SUB instructions:

record_types.name: AIRCR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_1
fields.description:
Write-only. System reset request bit setting is implementation
defined.

fields.name: Reserved_3_7
fields.description:
Interrupt priority grouping field. This field determines the split of
group priority from subpriority.

fields.name: Reserved_11_14
fields.description: Read-only. Data endianness bit setting is implementation defined.

fields.name: ENDIANNESS
fields.description:
Register key. On write, write 0x5FA to VECTKEY, otherwise the write
is ignored. Reads as 0xFA05

record_types.name: BFSR_Register

fields.name: IMPRECISERR
fields.description: BusFault on unstacking for a return from exception.

fields.name: UNSTKERR
fields.description: BusFault on stacking for exception entry.

fields.name: STKERR
fields.description: BusFault on floating-point lazy state preservation.

record_types.name: CCR_Register

fields.name: NONBASETHREADENA
fields.description: Enables unprivileged software access to the STIR

fields.name: UNALIGNED_TRP
fields.description:
Enables faulting or halting when the processor executes an SDIF or
UDIV instruction with a divisor of 0.

fields.name: Reserved_5_7
fields.description:
Enables handlers with priority -1 or -2 to ignore data BusFaults
caused by load and store instructions. This applies to the hard
fault, NMI, and FAULTMASK escalated handlers.

fields.name: BFHFNMIGN
fields.description:
Read-only. Always reads-as-one. It indicates stack alignment on
exception entry is 8-byte aligned.

record_types.name: CPUID_Register

fields.name: Revision
fields.description: Read-only. Part number of the processor.

fields.name: Constant_k
fields.description:
Read-only. Variant number, the r value in the rnpn product revision
identifier.

record_types.name: HFSR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_0
fields.description:
Indicates a BusFault on a vector table read during exception
processing.

fields.name: Reserved_2_29
fields.description:
Indicates a forced hard fault, generated by escalation of a fault
with configurable priority that cannot be handled, either because of
priority or because it is disabled.

fields.name: FORCED
fields.description:
Reserved for Debug use. When writing to the register, you must write
1 to this bit, otherwise behavior is UNPREDICTABLE.

record_types.name: ICSR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_9_10
fields.description: Read-only. Indicates whether there are preempted active exceptions.

fields.name: RETTOBASE
fields.description:
Read-only. Indicates the exception number of the highest priority
pending enabled exception.

fields.name: Reserved_21_21
fields.description: Interrupt pending flag, excluding NMI and Faults

record_types.name: MMSR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_2_2
fields.description: MemManage fault on unstacking for a return from exception

fields.name: MUNSTKERR
fields.description: MemManage fault on stacking for exception entry

fields.name: MSTKERR
fields.description: MemManage fault during floating-point lazy state preservation.

fields.name: Reserved_6_6
fields.description: MemManage fault address register valid flag.

record_types.name: SCB_Peripheral

fields.name: VTOR
fields.description: Application Interrupt and Reset Control Register

fields.name: SHPR3
fields.description: System Handler Control and State Register

record_types.name: SCR_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_0
fields.description:
Indicates sleep-on-exit when returning from Handler mode to Thread
mode

fields.name: SLEEPONEXIT
fields.description:
Controls whether the processor uses sleep or deep sleep as its
low-power mode

record_types.name: SHPR1_Register

fields.name: PRI_4
fields.description: Priority of the system handler, BusFault

fields.name: PRI_5
fields.description: Priority of the system handler, UsageFault

record_types.name: SHPR2_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_23
fields.description: Priority of the system handler, SVCall

record_types.name: SHPR3_Register

fields.name: Reserved_0_15
fields.description: Priority of the system handler, PendSV

fields.name: PRI_14
fields.description: Priority of the system handler, SysTick

record_types.name: SHPRS_Register

fields.name: MEMFAULTACT
fields.description:
Read-only. BusFault exception active bit, reads as 1 if exception is
active.

fields.name: Reserved_2_2
fields.description:
Read-only. UsageFault exception active bit, reads as 1 if exception
is active.

fields.name: Reserved_4_6
fields.description: Read-only. SVCall active bit, reads as 1 if exception is active.

fields.name: SVCALLACT
fields.description:
Read-only. Debug Monitor active bit, reads as 1 if exception is
active.

fields.name: Reserved_9_9
fields.description:
Read-only. PendSV exception active bit, reads as 1 if exception is
active.

fields.name: PENDSVACT
fields.description:
Read-only. Systick exception active bit, reads as 1 if exception is
active.

fields.name: SYSTICKACT
fields.description:
Read-only. UsageFault exception pending bit, reads as 1 if exception
is pending

fields.name: USGFAULTPENDED
fields.description:
Read-only. MemManage exception pending bit, reads as 1 if exception
is pending

fields.name: MEMFAULTPENDED
fields.description:
Read-only. BusFault exception pending bit, reads as 1 if exception is
pending

fields.name: BUSFAULTPENDED
fields.description: Read-only. SVCall pending bit, reads as 1 if exception is pending

fields.name: SVCALLPENDED
fields.description: MemManage enable bit, set to 1 to enable

fields.name: MEMFAULTENA
fields.description: BusFault enable bit, set to 1 to enable

fields.name: BUSFAULTENA
fields.description: UsageFault enable bit, set to 1 to enable

record_types.name: UFSR_Register

fields.name: INVSTATE
fields.description:
Invalid PC load UsageFault, caused by an invalid PC load by
EXC_RETURN

variables.name: SCB_Periph
variables.code:
SCB_Periph : aliased SCB_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => System'To_Address (16#E000E000#);
